name: DIGITAL REALTY TRUST, INC.
summary: Digital Realty Trust, Inc. is a leading global provider of data center, colocation, and interconnection solutions operating through its subsidiary Digital Realty Trust, L.P. The company offers PlatformDIGITAL, a global data center platform combining its Pervasive Data Center Architecture (PDx) methodology, serving enterprises, cloud service providers, IT firms, social media, content providers, and financial services sectors across over 300 facilities in 55+ metros in 30+ countries on six continents.

products.name: PlatformDIGITAL
products.description: Global data center platform enabling customers to deploy critical infrastructure, combining global presence with Pervasive Data Center Architecture (PDx) methodology for scaling digital business.

products.name: Pervasive Data Center Architecture (PDx)
products.description: Solution methodology for scaling digital business and efficiently managing Data Gravity challenges for enterprise customers.

products.name: Colocation Services
products.description: Data center colocation solutions ranging from single cabinet deployments up to multi-megawatt deployments for customers globally.

products.name: Interconnection Solutions
products.description: Connectivity and interconnection services with over 232,000 cross connects enabling customers to connect with partners and cloud providers.

products.name: Critical Facilities Management
products.description: 24/7 operational support for mission-critical data center facilities provided by a team of engineers and data center operations experts.

products.name: Data Gravity Index
products.description: Global forecast tool measuring the intensity and gravitational force of enterprise data growth to guide IT architecture decisions.

partnerships.description: Acquired majority interest in Teraco, the largest and most densely interconnected data center platform in South Africa, completed August 1, 2022.
